page: Amazon Web Services trn2.48xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel processor running at 3.5 GHz. It features 192 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) derived from 96 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled at 2.0 threads per core. The system is equipped with 2048.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 10.67 GB of RAM per physical core.

The instance includes 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, providing high-capacity, low-latency local data access. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 200 Gbps, managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor to ensure consistent throughput and isolation. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included.

With its high memory-to-core ratio and substantial local NVMe storage, this server offers high resource density for memory-intensive and storage-heavy workloads. It is designed for large-scale databases, memory-intensive analytics, high-throughput data processing, and distributed enterprise applications requiring massive memory footprints and rapid local storage access.
description: Amazon Web Services trn2.48xlarge is a high-capacity x86_64 server built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor. Powered by an Intel processor running at 3.5 GHz, it delivers 192 dedicated vCPUs across 96 physical cores. The hardware configuration features 2048.0 GB of system memory, providing 10.67 GB of RAM per core, alongside 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 200 Gbps. This resource-dense profile makes the instance highly efficient for memory-intensive operations and large-scale data processing. It is optimized for demanding workloads such as enterprise databases, big data analytics, and high-throughput storage-bound applications.
og_description: Amazon Web Services trn2.48xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 192 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 2048 GB RAM, 7600 GB local NVMe SSD storage, and 200 Gbps network bandwidth on the Nitro hypervisor.

tagline: A high-density x86_64 platform featuring 192 dedicated vCPUs, two terabytes of memory, and high-speed local NVMe SSD storage.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated vCPUs powered by a 3.5 GHz Intel processor
2048.0 GB of system memory for memory-intensive workloads
7600 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
200 Gbps baseline network bandwidth via AWS Nitro hypervisor
Optimized for large-scale databases and big data analytics
